rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the same real docstring overclaims on the three `: True` placeholders (ReductiveGroup, SemisimpleGroup, unipotentRadical_trivial'), which are grounded in the diff and would improve documentation if fixed. Review 2's extra AlgPoints nit is minor, imprecise at best, and not material (a maintainer would not require the change), so acting on either produces essentially the same resulting PR.
